[HOOK].text: "85% of adults are stuck in mediocrity." | TEXT: WAKE UP
[HOOK].visual_prompt: Young woman looking at a clock in frustration

[CURIOSITY].text: "You don't have to be one of them." | TEXT: TAKE CONTROL
[CURIOSITY].visual_prompt: Person standing on the edge of a cliff, looking out at the horizon

[EXPLANATION].text: "The 1% mindset is about being the exception." | TEXT: WORK HARDER

[INSIGHT].text: "It's about pushing beyond your limits." | TEXT: PUSH YOURSELF
[INSIGHT].visual_prompt: Person running up stairs with sweat dripping

[ENDING].visual_prompt: Person standing on the summit, looking out at the breathtaking view
